languages.text: Когда-то на этой планете царили почитатели Архиврага. Их культ давно уничтожен, но зловещие шепоты, повествующие о запретных тайнах, еще слышны в тенях этого мира.

traits.locale_text: Когда-то на этой планете царили почитатели Архиврага. Их культ давно уничтожен, но зловещие шепоты, повествующие о запретных тайнах, еще слышны в самых темных уголках колонии.
Когда-то на этой планете царили почитатели Архиврага. Их культ давно уничтожен, но зловещие шепоты, повествующие о запретных тайнах, еще слышны в тенях этого мира.

languages.text: This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.
languages.original_text: Когда-то на этой планете царили почитатели Архиврага. Их культ давно уничтожен, но зловещие шепоты, повествующие о запретных тайнах, еще слышны в тенях этого мира.

traits.locale_text: This world was once run by the Archenemy cultists. They're long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and secrets still permeate the colony.
This world was once run by the Archenemy cultists. They're long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and secrets still permeate the colony.
This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

languages.text: Diese Welt wurde einst von Anhängern des Erzfeindes beherrscht. Ihr Kult ist längst verschwunden, aber das Geflüster über ihre bösen Taten und verbotenen Geheimnisse durchdringt noch immer die Schatten dieser Welt.
languages.original_text: This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

traits.locale_text: Diese Welt wurde einst von Anhängern des Erzfeindes beherrscht. Ihr Kult ist längst verschwunden, aber das Geflüster über ihre bösen Taten und verbotenen Geheimnisse durchdringt noch immer die Schatten dieser Welt.

languages.text: Ce monde était autrefois dirigé par des adorateurs d'Archenemy. Leur culte a disparu depuis longtemps, mais les murmures de leurs actes maléfiques et de leurs secrets interdits se répandent encore dans les ombres de ce monde.
languages.original_text: This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

traits.locale_text: Ce monde était autrefois dirigé par des adorateurs d'Archenemy. Leur culte a disparu depuis longtemps, mais les murmures de leurs actes maléfiques et de leurs secrets interdits se répandent encore dans les ombres de ce monde.

languages.text: Este mundo estuvo antaño gobernado por adoradores del Archienemigo. Su culto desapareció hace tiempo, pero los rumores de sus malvados actos y secretos prohibidos aún recorren las sombras de este mundo.
languages.original_text: This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

traits.locale_text: Este mundo estuvo antaño gobernado por adoradores del Archienemigo. Su culto desapareció hace tiempo, pero los rumores de sus malvados actos y secretos prohibidos aún recorren las sombras de este mundo.

languages.text: Bu dünya bir zamanlar Archenemy'ye tapanlar tarafından yönetiliyordu. Tarikatları çoktan yok oldu, ancak yaptıkları kötülüklerin ve yasak sırların fısıltıları hâlâ bu dünyanın gölgelerinde dolaşıyor.
languages.original_text: This world was once run by Archenemy worshippers. Their cult is long gone, but whispers of their evil deeds and forbidden secrets still permeate through the shadows of this world.

traits.locale_text: Bu dünya bir zamanlar Archenemy'ye tapanlar tarafından yönetiliyordu. Tarikatları çoktan yok oldu, ancak yaptıkları kötülüklerin ve yasak sırların fısıltıları hâlâ bu dünyanın gölgelerinde dolaşıyor.
